game.title: La carrera de barquitos
game.story_connection: Coco and Mango are racing paper boats in the stream - tap to blow your boat forward!

mechanics.core_loop: Tap repeatedly to blow your paper boat forward. Avoid debris and rescue Mango if he falls in!

controls.tap_repeatedly: Each tap blows the boat forward a bit
controls.hold: Alternative: hold to blow continuously (less efficient)

race.drift: Boat slowly drifts toward obstacles if not steered

obstacles.effect: Full stop, must tap to unstick

events.description: Mango falls in water, tap rescue button quickly!

states.mango_rescue: Quick time event to save Mango

visuals.background: Stream/river view from above, water flowing
visuals.boat: Paper boat (origami style) with Coco on it
visuals.mango_boat: Second boat with Mango (NPC, follows behind)

instructions_text: ¡Sopla tu barquito! Toca rápido para avanzar. Esquiva los obstáculos y ¡rescata a Mango si se cae!
implementation_notes: Tap counter determines speed (taps per second)
Boat position advances based on tap rate
Obstacles scroll toward boat (or boat moves through level)
Mango rescue: overlay with big rescue button, countdown timer
Water ripple effects with CSS animation
Distance meter shows progress to finish
